title: node:test, Supertest, Contracts, Properties, Fuzzing, and Fault Injection · TypeScript Build Room
summary: A backend pairing room predicts runtime, request, middleware, dependency, response, and cleanup transitions before assembling the first layered deterministic server verification matrix for node:test, supertest, contracts, properties, fuzzing, and fault injection. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of layered deterministic server verification matrix while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: Use node:test suites, subtests, assertions, fixtures, hooks, concurrency, timers, and cleanup to prove domain decisions independently of Express.
Exercise Express handlers with Supertest using exact methods, paths, fields, bodies, identity, effects, errors, and cleanup without unnecessary public listeners.
Verify runtime requests and responses against schemas and consumer cases while detecting undocumented statuses, fields, nullability, security, and behavioral drift.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Pure Domain Node Test
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop team handles case 4061 in a canary revision draining long-lived response streams. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to gate release on layered domain, handler, fuzz, and resource-lifecycle evidence; retain a screen-reader-readable decision trace; then make OpenAPI and runtime disagree on nullability and block the release. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use node:test suites, subtests, assertions, fixtures, hooks, concurrency, timers, and cleanup to prove domain decisions independently of Express.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Pure Domain Node Test.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use node:test suites, subtests, assertions, fixtures, hooks, concurrency, timers, and cleanup to prove domain decisions independently of express. For Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Pure Domain Node Test, keep Pure Domain Node Test connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Audit the initial evidence packet · Workshop Fault Time Load Leak Gates
